title: TcpConnection: bare except clauses swallow all exceptions
description: In python/src/lichen/interface/tcp.py TcpConnection, the get_peername() and close() methods catch all exceptions with bare 'except Exception:' and log debug messages. While the logging was added, catching Exception is too broad - it will swallow KeyboardInterrupt (via SystemExit) if it occurs during close. Consider catching more specific exceptions (OSError, ConnectionError) or using 'except BaseException:' with re-raise for SystemExit/KeyboardInterrupt.
